title: Types of Machines
subtitle: Man-made Machines vs Computers
overview: This session introduces students to different types of machines, how machines help humans in daily life, and the difference between man-made machines and computers using simple real-life examples.

images._note: Add photos from actual session — machine demos, computers, household appliances, transportation machines, robotics activities.

gallery.caption: Bicycle helps humans move faster with less effort
Electric fan converts electricity into motion
Computer processes data and follows instructions
Washing machine helps clean clothes automatically
Robots combine machines and computers together
Calculator is a small computing machine
Students identifying machines used in daily life

keyTopics: What is a Machine? — A device that makes work easier
Simple Machines — Lever, pulley, wheel, inclined plane
Complex Machines — Fan, washing machine, bicycle, car
Man-made Machines — Created by humans to reduce effort
What is a Computer? — An electronic machine that processes data
Machines need human control while computers follow instructions
Real-life examples of machines around us
How computers are used in schools, hospitals, banks and homes

youtubeVideos.title: What are Machines?
youtubeVideos._note: Replace with actual educational video ID if needed

youtubeVideos.title: Introduction to Computers for Kids

activity.title: Identify Machines Around You
steps: Observe machines used at home or school
Separate them into machine and computer categories
Discuss how each machine helps humans
Identify which machines use computers inside them

options: A device that makes work easier
quiz.explanation: Machines help humans do work faster and easier.

quiz.q: Which of these is a machine?
quiz.explanation: A bicycle helps humans move easily, so it is a machine.

options: An electronic machine that processes data
quiz.explanation: Computers process information and follow instructions.
Washing machines help clean clothes automatically.

quiz.q: Which device is mainly used for calculations and data processing?
quiz.explanation: Computers process data and perform calculations.

quiz.q: Which is an example of a computer device?
quiz.explanation: Laptop is a type of computer.
Machines make work easier and reduce human effort.

quiz.q: Which machine moves air in a room?
What does a computer need to work?

quiz.explanation: Lever is one of the basic simple machines.

quiz.q: Which machine is used in banks to withdraw money?
quiz.explanation: ATM machines help people withdraw money.

quiz.q: What is the main difference between machines and computers?
options: Computers process information while machines mainly perform physical work
quiz.explanation: Machines mainly help with physical work, while computers process information.

quiz.q: Which of these combines machines and computers together?
quiz.explanation: Robots use both machines and computer systems.
Printers are output machines connected to computers.
